rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §25.083, which governs school day interruptions and removal of students for remedial tutoring.
quote: The board of trustees of each school district shall adopt and strictly enforce a policy limiting interruptions of classes during the school day for nonacademic activities such as announcements and sales promotions.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated subject (school day interruptions).
